home.hero-text: I build scalable web applications and educational platforms — from Junior to Lead Frontend, owning architecture, component systems, performance, and production delivery.
home.about-text:
Frontend developer with experience building scalable web apps and EdTech platforms. Grew from Junior to Lead Frontend Developer — owning architecture, reusable components, and optimization.

Core stack: Vue 3, TypeScript, Nuxt, REST API & WebSockets. Also work with React, Next.js, Flutter, and Rust.

Russian — native, English — B2. Open to strong teams and ambitious products.
